name: kaitox
description: Kaitox — a personal toolkit: CLI, Obsidian plugin, Chrome extension, and agent skills. First feature: publish local Markdown as X (Twitter) Article drafts.

scripts.build: npm run build -w @kaitox/relay-protocol && npm run build -w @kaitox/x-article && npm run build -w @kaitox/relay && npm run build -w @kaitox/cli
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @kaitox/relay-protocol && npm run typecheck -w @kaitox/x-article && npm run typecheck -w @kaitox/relay && npm run typecheck -w @kaitox/cli
scripts.test:all: npm run build && npm test -w @kaitox/x-article && node test/integration.mjs && node test/relay-protocol.smoke.mjs
scripts.release: npm run build && npm run test:all && changeset publish
